name: bats (Bash Automated Testing System)
description: Installs bats-core, bats-support, bats-assert, and bats-mock for shell script testing.

batsVersion.description: bats-core version to install. Accepts with or without a leading 'v' (e.g. '1.13.0' or 'v1.13.0').

batsSupportVersion.description: bats-support version to install. Accepts with or without a leading 'v'.

batsAssertVersion.description: bats-assert version to install. Accepts with or without a leading 'v'.

batsMockVersion.description: bats-mock version to install. Accepts with or without a leading 'v'.

github.copilot.chat.codeGeneration.instr.text: This dev container has bats-core (Bash Automated Testing System) and its helper libraries (bats-support, bats-assert, bats-mock) installed globally. Write shell script tests using `@test` blocks and run them with `bats <file>` or `bats test/`. Use `load 'bats-support/load'` and `load 'bats-assert/load'` at the top of test files to access assertion helpers like `assert_output` and `assert_success`.
